if.description: If provides conditional pipeline execution logic. If the condition resolves to false, the pipeline is skipped.

stages.description: Pipeline stages - can contain stages, groups, or parallel executions.

Clone.title: Clone
Clone.description: Clone defines the default clone behavior.

enabled.description: Enables or disables the default clone step.

strategy.description: Strategy configures the PR clone strategy.

submodules.description: Submodules enables cloning all submodules. Accepts boolean, string (true/false/recursive), or expression.

repo.description: Repo defines the repository name or URL.

clonedir.description: Clonedir defines the clone directory path.

sparse-checkout.description: SparseCheckout defines paths to limit the clone to specific directories.

pre-fetch.description: PreFetch defines a command to run before the clone operation.

persist-credentials.description: PersistCredentials configures git credentials to persist after clone so subsequent git operations in the workspace can authenticate.

Expression.title: Expression
Expression.description: String value matching a Harness pipeline expression or template placeholder (e.g., <+something> or ${{ ... }}).

NGVariableV1Wrapper.title: NGVariableV1Wrapper
NGVariableV1Wrapper.description: Wrapper for stage/pipeline-level input variables. Keys are variable names, values define variable configuration.

enum.description: Defines a list of accepted input values.

options.description: Defines a list of accepted input values. Alias for enum (GitHub compatibility).

required.description: Required indicates the variable is required.

execution_input.description: A boolean that defines whether the value is an execution input.

items.description: Defines the item type for array variables.

options.description: Defines a list of accepted input values. Alias for enum (GitHub compatibility).

enum.description: Defines a list of accepted input values.

pattern.description: Regex pattern for variable value validation.

mask.description: Indicates the input should be masked.

ui.description: UI configuration for variable rendering in forms.

VariableUI.title: VariableUI
VariableUI.description: UI configuration for variable rendering in forms.

component.description: Form element type for rendering the variable input.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the form element.

tooltip.description: Tooltip/help text for the form element.

autofocus.description: Whether the form element should be auto-focused.

hidden.description: Whether the variable should be hidden in the UI.

readonly.description: Whether the variable should be read-only in the UI.

label.description: Display label for the variable in the UI.

enum.description: Defines a list of accepted input values.
Defines a list of accepted input values.
Defines a list of accepted input values.
Defines a list of accepted input values.
Defines a list of accepted input values.
Defines a list of accepted input values.
Defines a list of accepted input values.

Delegate.title: Delegate
Delegate.description: Delegate defines the delegate matching logic. Supports expressions.

gitBranch.description: Git branch for remote template resolution.

WithInputs.title: WithInputs
WithInputs.description: Input overrides for service, environment, or infrastructure.

StrategyConfigV1.title: StrategyConfigV1
StrategyConfigV1.description: Strategy defines execution strategy configuration (matrix, for, while, repeat).

max-parallel.description: Maximum number of parallel executions. Supports expressions.

fail-fast.description: Whether to fail fast on first failure. Supports expressions.

if.description: Conditional expression to determine whether the strategy should execute. Supports expressions.

MatrixConfigV1.title: MatrixConfigV1
MatrixConfigV1.description: Matrix strategy configuration for parallel execution across multiple dimensions.

exclude.description: Combinations to exclude from the matrix. Supports expressions.

include.description: Additional combinations to include in the matrix. Supports expressions.

node-name.description: Custom naming pattern for matrix nodes. Supports expressions.

additionalProperties.description: Matrix axes - key is axis name, value is array of values or expression.

iterations.description: Number of iterations to execute. Supports expressions.

node-name.description: Custom naming pattern for loop nodes. Supports expressions.

iterations.description: Maximum number of iterations. Supports expressions.

condition.description: Condition expression to evaluate for continuing the loop. Supports expressions.

node-name.description: Custom naming pattern for loop nodes. Supports expressions.

RepeatConfigV1.title: RepeatConfigV1
RepeatConfigV1.description: Repeat strategy configuration for iterating over items.

iterations.description: Number of iterations (alternative to items). Supports expressions.

items.description: List of items to iterate over. Supports expressions.

node-name.description: Custom naming pattern for repeat nodes. Supports expressions.

partition-size.description: Size of each partition when splitting items. Supports expressions.

start.description: Starting index for iteration. Supports expressions.

end.description: Ending index for iteration. Supports expressions.

OnFailure.title: OnFailure
OnFailure.description: Failure strategy configuration. Supports single value or array. Supports expressions.

FailureConfigV1.title: FailureConfigV1
FailureConfigV1.description: Failure strategy configuration for handling errors.

errors.description: List of error types to handle. Supports single value or array. Supports expressions.

NGFailureTypeV1.title: NGFailureTypeV1
NGFailureTypeV1.description: Failure error types for failure strategy configuration.

FailureStrategyActionConfigV1.title: FailureStrategyActionConfigV1
FailureStrategyActionConfigV1.description: Action configuration for failure strategy. Can be a string shorthand or a detailed object.

attempts.description: Number of retry attempts. Supports expressions.

interval.description: Interval between retries. Can be single value or array of timeouts. Supports expressions.

failure-action.description: Action to take after all retries are exhausted.

ManualFailureSpecConfigV1.title: ManualFailureSpecConfigV1
ManualFailureSpecConfigV1.description: Manual intervention configuration for failure strategy.

timeout.description: Timeout for manual intervention. Supports expressions.

timeout-action.description: Action to take when timeout is reached.

available-actions.description: List of available actions for manual intervention.

RetryStepGroupFailureSpecConfigV1.title: RetryStepGroupFailureSpecConfigV1
RetryStepGroupFailureSpecConfigV1.description: Retry step group configuration for failure strategy.

attempts.description: Number of retry attempts. Supports expressions.

interval.description: Interval between retries. Can be single value or array of timeouts. Supports expressions.

OutputV1.title: OutputV1
OutputV1.description: Output variable definition for capturing step outputs.

mask.description: Whether to mask the output variable value in logs.

ObjectOrExpression.title: ObjectOrExpression
ObjectOrExpression.description: Object or expression value. Supports expressions.

UnifiedTemplate.title: UnifiedTemplate
UnifiedTemplate.description: Template reference for steps, stages, or pipelines.

name.description: Display name for the template-referenced item.

CIResourceClass.title: CIResourceClass
CIResourceClass.description: Cloud runner machine size enumeration (maps to io.harness.beans.yaml.extended.CIResourceClass).

Reference.title: Reference
Reference.description: Reference defines a git clone reference.

name.description: Name provides ref name (branch name, tag name, or PR number).

sha.description: Sha provides the commit sha for direct sha-based clone.

number.description: Number provides the PR number for pull-request type clone.

Resource.title: Resource
Resource.description: Resource defines container resource limits and requests.

limits.description: Limits defines the maximum resources the container can use.

requests.description: Requests defines the minimum resources reserved for the container.

ResourceLimits.title: ResourceLimits
ResourceLimits.description: ResourceLimits defines CPU and memory constraints.

Repository.title: Repository
Repository.description: Repository defines a remote git repository.

On.title: On
On.description: On provides conditional pipeline execution logic based on trigger event and action mapping. If the conditional logic resolves to false, the pipeline is skipped.

EventType.title: EventType
EventType.description: EventType defines the supported trigger event types.

OnEvent.title: OnEvent
OnEvent.description: OnEvent represents a single event in the on array - either a string or an object with event configuration.

BranchFilter.title: BranchFilter
BranchFilter.description: BranchFilter defines branch filtering for push and pull_request events.

NotificationRules.title: NotificationRules
NotificationRules.description: NotificationRules defines notification configuration for pipeline events.

id.description: Unique identifier for the notification rule.

disabled.description: Whether the notification rule is disabled.

on.description: Notification events that trigger the notification.

NotificationEvent.title: NotificationEvent
NotificationEvent.description: NotificationEvent defines event types that trigger notifications.

keys.description: List of MS Teams webhook keys.

headers.description: HTTP headers for the webhook request.

StageItems.title: StageItems
StageItems.description: Available stage types for pipeline execution.

UnifiedStageNodeV1.title: UnifiedStageNodeV1
UnifiedStageNodeV1.description: Unified stage node supporting CI, CD, IaCM and other stage types.

if.description: Conditional execution expression. Stage is skipped if condition resolves to false.

strategy.description: Execution strategy (matrix, parallelism, etc.). Supports expressions.

shared-paths.description: Paths shared across steps within the stage. Supports expressions.

needs.description: Stage dependencies (stages that must complete before this one).

steps.description: List of steps to execute in the stage.

rollback.description: Rollback steps to execute on failure.

clone.description: Git clone configuration for the stage.

env.description: Environment variables for the stage. Supports expressions.

build-intelligence.description: Build intelligence configuration for test optimization.

volumes.description: Volume configurations for the stage runtime. Supports expressions.

RuntimeV1.title: RuntimeV1
RuntimeV1.description: Runtime execution engine configuration. Either a string shorthand (cloud|shell|vm|k8) or an object carrying one of the runtime specs.

ShellRuntimeSpec.title: ShellRuntimeSpec
ShellRuntimeSpec.description: Shell runtime specification. Mirrors io.harness.beans.yaml.extended.runtime.V1.RuntimeV1.ShellRuntimeSpec (no configurable fields).

size.description: Machine size class for the cloud runner. Supports expressions.

virtualization.description: Whether nested virtualization is enabled on the runner. Supports expressions.

image.description: Bring-Your-Own-Image runner image reference. Supports expressions.

connector.description: Connector reference used to pull the BYOI runner image. Supports expressions.

os.description: Operating system for the VM runtime. Supports expressions.

harness-image-connector.description: Harness image connector used to pull runner images. Supports expressions.

timeout.description: VM init timeout duration. Supports expressions.

user.description: User ID to run container as. Supports expressions.

harness-image-connector.description: Harness image connector for pulling images. Supports expressions.

automount-service-token.description: Whether to automount service account token. Supports expressions.

priority-class.description: Kubernetes priority class name. Supports expressions.

host.description: Host aliases for the pod. Supports expressions.

service-account.description: Kubernetes service account name. Supports expressions.

pod-spec-overlay.description: Pod spec overlay JSON/YAML. Supports expressions.

tolerationSeconds.description: Toleration seconds for NoExecute effect. Supports expressions.

CIVolumeV1.title: CIVolumeV1
CIVolumeV1.description: CI volume configuration. Type determined by 'uses' property.

mount-path.description: Mount path in the container. Supports expressions.

medium.description: Storage medium (Memory or default). Supports expressions.

size.description: Size limit for the volume. Supports expressions.

mount-path.description: Mount path in the container. Supports expressions.

claim-name.description: Name of the PersistentVolumeClaim. Supports expressions.

read-only.description: Whether to mount as read-only. Supports expressions.

mount-path.description: Mount path in the container. Supports expressions.

path.description: Path on the host. Supports expressions.

type.description: HostPath type (DirectoryOrCreate, Directory, FileOrCreate, File, Socket, CharDevice, BlockDevice). Supports expressions.

mount-path.description: Mount path in the container. Supports expressions.

name.description: Name of the ConfigMap. Supports expressions.

optional.description: Whether the ConfigMap must exist. Supports expressions.

mount-path.description: Mount path in the container. Supports expressions.

name.description: Name of the Secret. Supports expressions.

optional.description: Whether the Secret must exist. Supports expressions.

allow-privilege-escalation.description: Whether to allow privilege escalation. Supports expressions.

privileged.description: Whether to run in privileged mode. Supports expressions.

read-only-root-file-system.description: Whether root filesystem is read-only. Supports expressions.

run-as-non-root.description: Whether to run as non-root user. Supports expressions.

run-as-group.description: Group ID to run container as. Supports expressions.

user.description: User ID to run container as. Supports expressions.

ServiceV1.title: ServiceV1
ServiceV1.description: Service configuration for CD stages. Supports multiple formats.

items.description: List of services for multi-service deployment.

sequential.description: Execute services sequentially (one at a time). When false, services run in parallel.

ref.description: Git branch for the service configuration.
Git branch for the environment configuration.

items.description: List of environments for multi-environment deployment.

sequential.description: Execute environments sequentially (one at a time). When false, environments run in parallel.
Execute environments sequentially (one at a time). When false, environments run in parallel.

filters.description: Filters for selecting environments and infrastructures.

sequential.description: Execute environments sequentially (one at a time). When false, environments run in parallel.

ref.description: Git branch for the environment configuration.

Filters.title: Filters
Filters.description: Filters for selecting environments or infrastructures.

FilterCondition.title: FilterCondition
FilterCondition.description: Filter condition for property-based filtering (e.g., tags).

in.description: Match any of the specified tags (OR).

all.description: Match all of the specified tags (AND).

sequential.description: Execute environments sequentially (one at a time). When false, environments run in parallel.

items.description: List of environments from the group.

filters.description: Filters for selecting environments and infrastructures.

enabled.description: Whether caching is enabled. Supports expressions.

BuildIntelligenceV1.title: BuildIntelligenceV1
BuildIntelligenceV1.description: Build intelligence configuration for test optimization.

enabled.description: Whether build intelligence is enabled. Supports expressions.

UnifiedPipelineStageNode.title: UnifiedPipelineStageNode
UnifiedPipelineStageNode.description: Pipeline chain stage node for chaining pipelines.

uses.description: Reference to the pipeline to be chained.

inputs.description: Input parameters for the chained pipeline. Supports expressions.

outputs.description: Output mappings from the chained pipeline.

StepItems.title: StepItems
StepItems.description: Available step types for pipeline execution.

StepNodeV1.title: StepNodeV1
StepNodeV1.description: Unified step node for CI/CD pipelines.

if.description: Conditional execution expression. Step is skipped if condition resolves to false. Supports expressions.

strategy.description: Execution strategy (matrix, for, while, repeat). Supports expressions.

needs.description: Step dependencies (steps that must complete before this one).

run.description: Run step configuration. Can be a simple command string or a detailed run configuration object.

run-test.description: Run tests step configuration. Supports expressions.

background.description: Background service step configuration. Supports expressions.

RunStepInfoV1.title: RunStepInfoV1
RunStepInfoV1.description: Run step configuration for executing scripts.

shell.description: Shell type to use. Supports expressions.

target.description: Target path to save the file.

checksum.description: Checksum to verify the downloaded file.

fallback.description: Fallback URL if primary source fails.

output-alias.description: Output alias configuration for exporting variables.

image.description: Container image to use. Supports expressions.

privileged.description: Run in privileged mode. Supports expressions.

user.description: User ID to run as. Supports expressions.

paths.description: Report file paths. Can be single value or array. Supports expressions.

RunTestsStepInfoV1.title: RunTestsStepInfoV1
RunTestsStepInfoV1.description: Run tests step configuration for test intelligence.

shell.description: Shell type to use. Supports expressions.

script.description: Test command to execute. Supports expressions.

match.description: Test file patterns to match. Supports expressions.

disabled.description: Whether test intelligence is disabled. Supports expressions.

UnifiedWaitStepNode.title: UnifiedWaitStepNode
UnifiedWaitStepNode.description: Wait step node for pausing pipeline execution.

UnifiedPmsAbstractStepNode.title: UnifiedPmsAbstractStepNode
UnifiedPmsAbstractStepNode.description: Abstract step node with common properties shared by all step types.

if.description: Conditional execution expression. Step is skipped if condition resolves to false. Supports expressions.

strategy.description: Execution strategy (matrix, for, while, repeat). Supports expressions.

UnifiedBarrierStepNode.title: UnifiedBarrierStepNode
UnifiedBarrierStepNode.description: Barrier step node for synchronizing pipeline execution.

name.description: Reference name of the barrier defined in pipeline barriers.

UnifiedQueueStepNode.title: UnifiedQueueStepNode
UnifiedQueueStepNode.description: Queue step node for resource constraint management.

key.description: Resource key for the queue. Supports expressions.

UnifiedPolicyStepNode.title: UnifiedPolicyStepNode
UnifiedPolicyStepNode.description: Policy step node for OPA policy evaluation.

sets.description: Policy sets to evaluate. Supports single value or array. Supports expressions.

payload.description: JSON payload to evaluate against policies. Supports expressions.

UnifiedApprovalStepNode.title: UnifiedApprovalStepNode
UnifiedApprovalStepNode.description: Approval step node for manual, Jira, ServiceNow, or custom approvals.

callback.description: Callback ID for the approval. Supports expressions.

user-groups.description: User groups for approval. Supports single value or array. Supports expressions.

service-accounts.description: Service accounts for approval. Supports single value or array. Supports expressions.

approvers-min-count.description: Minimum number of approvers required. Supports expressions.

block-executor.description: Block pipeline executor from approving. Supports expressions.

auto-reject.description: Enable automatic rejection on timeout. Supports expressions.

timezone.description: Timezone for auto-approval deadline. Supports expressions.

inputs.description: Approver input parameters keyed by input variable name.

pattern.description: Regex pattern the approver input value must match. Mutually exclusive with `enum`. Supports expressions.

multi-select.description: Allow selecting multiple values from `enum`. Only applicable when `enum` is provided.

enum.description: Allowed values for the approver input. Mutually exclusive with `pattern`. Supports expressions.

required.description: Whether the approver input is required.

default.description: Default value for the approver input. Supports expressions.

run.description: Run step configuration for script execution.
Run step configuration for script execution.
Run step configuration for script execution.

ParallelSteps.title: ParallelSteps
ParallelSteps.description: Defines a list of steps to be executed in parallel.

id.description: Unique identifier for the step group.

name.description: Display name of the step group.

if.description: Conditional execution expression. Group is skipped if condition resolves to false.

strategy.description: Execution strategy (matrix, for, while, repeat). Supports expressions.

PlatformV1.title: PlatformV1
PlatformV1.description: Platform configuration describing the operating system and CPU architecture for a stage runtime.

os.description: Operating system for the stage runtime. Supports expressions.

arch.description: CPU architecture for the stage runtime. Supports expressions.
